payload.description: Implemented all 4 phases: browser detail panel, session history, wizard setting/agents/orchestrator/HITL tabs, LLMDefaults config model

payload.decision: Renamed _render to _render_config in TemplateDetailPanel to avoid Textual Widget._render() method collision
payload.rationale: Textual internally calls _render() on all widgets, naming collision caused TypeError

payload.topic: Textual Widget method names to avoid
payload.summary: _render is used internally by Textual Widget base class. Custom render methods must use different names.

Completed 4-phase TUI enhancement: (1) Browser split-view with TemplateDetailPanel rendering all SessionConfig data, (2) Session history screen for browsing transcripts, (3) Full wizard with Setting/Agents/Orchestrator/HITL tabs, (4) LLMDefaults config model wired through engine. 344 tests pass. Key gotcha: Textual Widget._render() is reserved — use _render_config() instead.

payload.decision: Used data-model-driven rendering in TemplateDetailPanel — all game templates render automatically from GameConfig without game-specific logic
payload.rationale: Future-proof: new games with valid GameConfig display correctly with zero code changes

payload.decision: Auto-generate team channels from agent team assignments in wizard _build_channels_from_agents()
payload.rationale: Users assign teams on agents; channels are derived — simpler UX than manual channel creation

payload.decision: Implemented Telephone orchestrator as state machine with 4 phases (opening, waiting_for_hitl, chain, reveal) tracking state via game_state.custom
payload.rationale: Matches existing orchestrator patterns (turn_based, mafia) — no engine changes needed

payload.decision: Players whisper to each other directly in the chain — Operator only handles initial handoff and final reveal, not intermediary distortion
payload.rationale: Each player applies their own linguistic decay based on their education/background, which is more natural than a uniform phonetic pipeline through a central Operator
alternatives_rejected: Operator as noisy channel between every player transition

payload.decision: Player personas grounded in concrete character backgrounds (factory supervisor, retired professor, immigrant, patent attorney, 7-year-old, screenwriter) rather than abstract processing bias labels
payload.rationale: Education and vocabulary naturally produce different types of decay: phonetic approximation, register elevation, structural compression, domain drift, conceptual concretization, narrative fabrication
alternatives_rejected: Abstract Bottom-Up/Top-Down processing bias labels without character grounding

payload.decision: Added discussion phase between chain and reveal — last player announces publicly, Operator reveals original, each player discusses where things went wrong, then Operator delivers final analysis
payload.rationale: Mirrors real Telephone game flow: announce, compare, discuss, reveal full chain
alternatives_rejected: Direct chain-to-reveal with no group discussion

payload.decision: HITL input bar shown for entire session when hitl.enabled=true, with role name in placeholder text — no per-turn show/hide
payload.rationale: User always has an input field like real chat apps — the orchestrator decides what to do with messages, not the UI
alternatives_rejected: Per-turn show/hide based on game_state phase detection
